# Hammer Street Clean

> A two-person grassroots street cleaning and graffiti removal business based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada.

Hammer Street Clean (HSC) provides graffiti removal, public space cleanup, and alleyway sanitation services in Hamilton, Ontario. We are contracted by Barton Village BIA and also serve private property owners, businesses, and community organizations.

## Services

- Graffiti removal from walls, fences, and public structures using specialized cleaning agents
- Public space cleanup: parks, sidewalks, and shared community spaces
- Alleyway sanitation: debris, graffiti, and waste removal from back corridors

## City Grant Program

Hamilton businesses and property owners in designated corridors (Barton Village, Downtown Hamilton, and other BIAs) may qualify for up to $1,000/year in City-funded graffiti removal. HSC assists with photos, paperwork, and the removal itself.
Details: https://www.hammerstreetclean.org/grant.html

## Report an Issue

Residents can report graffiti, illegal dumping, needles, or other public hazards directly to HSC via the online form — no account needed, works on any phone.
Form: https://www.hammerstreetclean.org/report.html
